en: Praise the LORD!Praise the LORD from the heavens; praise him in the heights!
zh: 你們要讚美耶和華。 你們要從天上讚美耶和華， 在高天讚美他。

en: Praise him, all his angels; praise him, all his hosts!
zh: 他的眾使者啊！你們要讚美他； 他的眾軍啊！你們也要讚美他。

en: Praise him, sun and moon, praise him, all you shining stars!
zh: 太陽和月亮啊！你們要讚美他； 光亮的星星啊！你們都要讚美他。

en: Praise him, you highest heavens, and you waters above the heavens!
zh: 天上的天啊！你們要讚美他。 天上的水啊！你們要讚美他。

en: Let them praise the name of the LORD! For he commanded and they were created.
zh: 願這一切都讚美耶和華的名， 因為他一發令，它們就都造成。

en: And he established them forever and ever; he gave a decree, and it shall not pass away.
zh: 他把它們立定，直到永永遠遠； 他立了定律，永不廢去 。

en: Praise the LORD from the earth, you great sea creatures and all deeps,
zh: 你們要從地上讚美耶和華。 海怪和一切深海，

en: fire and hail, snow and mist, stormy wind fulfilling his word!
zh: 火和冰雹，雪和雲霧， 執行他命令的狂風，

en: Mountains and all hills, fruit trees and all cedars!
zh: 大山和一切小山， 果樹和一切香柏樹，

en: Beasts and all livestock, creeping things and flying birds!
zh: 野獸和一切牲畜， 爬行的動物和飛鳥，

en: Kings of the earth and all peoples, princes and all rulers of the earth!
zh: 地上的君王和萬族的人民， 領袖和地上所有的審判官，

en: Young men and maidens together, old men and children!
zh: 少男和少女， 老年人和孩童，

en: Let them praise the name of the LORD, for his name alone is exalted; his majesty is above earth and heaven.
zh: 願這一切都讚美耶和華的名， 因為獨有他的名被尊崇， 他的榮耀超越天地。

en: He has raised up a horn for his people, praise for all his saints, for the people of Israel who are near to him. Praise the LORD!
zh: 他使自己子民的角得以高舉 ， 他所有的聖民，就是和他接近的以色列人，都讚美他。 你們要讚美耶和華。
